texto: I can't fall apart every time I mention that my mother's gone. I actually laugh about stories or things or situations. Of course there's a wound that will never be patched up, but I approach it with humor. Of course, I don't overlook it and go straight for the humor, but I think we have to have humor to move forward.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Colman Domingo sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “I can't fall apart every time I mention that my mother's gone. I actually laugh about stories or …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, time, mother, útil em momentos de mother e fall.
